reddit.name: reddit
reddit.detail: RETIRED 2026-07-20. Reddit blocks unauthenticated JSON: old.reddit.com 403 and www.reddit.com 403, tested live with a browser User-Agent. No REDDIT_CLIENT_ID exists anywhere in the repo, so no request this system can make will succeed. The endpoint fix in 9bc2849 (old.reddit + raw_json=1) was correct code against a door that is shut. Reviving this source requires a registered OAuth app and oauth.reddit.com — not a code change here.

value.regime_read: NQ weak vs ES — rotation OUT of tech. A breadth/rotation warning; tech-led longs are suspect.
value.narrative:
Macro backdrop —
[2026-07-21] US economic state (FRED):
  Growth: real GDP 2.1% (q/q ann)
  Inflation: CPI 3.23% YoY | core CPI 2.25% | core PCE n/a (Fed target 2%)
  Labor: unemployment 4.2%
  Rates: fed funds 3.63% | 10Y 4.55% | 10Y-2Y 0.39% (NORMAL)
  Consumer: UMich sentiment 44.8 | VIX 18.77

---
PRE-US-OPEN BRIEFING — ES/NQ (intelligence only, no execution path; CME futures, not tradable via OANDA).

1) RECENT MOVE-BY-MOVE READ. Both indices are green on the day (ES +0.39%, NQ +1.30%) but red on the week (ES -1.02%, NQ -2.14%). The picture is a bounce inside a down week, not a fresh breakout. NQ's larger daily gain looks like a mechanical rebound off a beaten-down tech tape — note NQ RSI14 at 35.8 is near-oversold while ES RSI14 sits neutral at 46.6. That divergence in momentum (tech deeply washed out, broad index only mildly soft) is the tell of the week: money has been leaving concentrated tech and the daily pop is relief, not leadership. Catalyst-wise, the news flow is dominated by GEOPOLITICS (Iran/US-forces escalation headlines, UK fiscal/tax noise) rather than a clean macro or earnings driver — that's a risk-tone backdrop, not a directional catalyst. The one clean single-name tech item (Barclays upgrading Marvell on AI-infra demand) is idiosyncratic and doesn't rescue the broad NQ read. Net: today's green is corrective within a weak week, and the catalyst mix is muddy.

2) VOLUME-PROFILE READ (where volume traded — NOT order-flow delta; true buy/sell aggression would need a CME order-flow feed). ES: POC 7518.8 with a tight cluster of high-volume nodes (7511–7526) — price at 7513.75 is sitting right inside its acceptance shelf, essentially pinned to fair value and just under session VWAP (7520.48). Value area 7480–7607. The line in the sand for ES is the value-area low ~7480 / prior-day low 7476.75; lose that and the corrective bounce fails. NQ: POC is far below at 28793 with the bulk of accepted volume 28793–29024, while price at 29153 trades ABOVE its own POC and near the value-area high (29453). That means NQ has rallied off its heavy-volume shelf into thinner air — an accumulation zone sits well below current price. NQ is more extended above its acceptance than ES; that asymmetry argues the NQ pop is the one more likely to fade back toward 28793–29024.

3) NQ/ES LEAD-LAG REGIME. Regime = ROTATION_WARN. Contemporaneous correlation is high (0.901) but the lead-lag structure is NOT clean — best_lag is +2 with a best_corr of only 0.102 and leader tagged NONE. Cumulative NQ-ES spread is negative (-0.0447) with the 20d spread negative: NQ is structurally weak vs ES over the lookback. Translation: tech-led longs are suspect. Today's NQ outperformance runs AGAINST the 20-day rotation, which is why I read it as mean-reversion, not regime change. No clean leader + a rotation-out-of-tech signal = LOW trust and SMALL size. This is a regime INPUT, not an edge.

4) EVENT-CALENDAR AWARENESS. FOMC in 8 days (2026-07-29) — begin reducing size / widening stops as we approach the window. PCE in ~10 days (cadence estimate, 8:30 ET), ISM in ~13, NFP in ~17. Nothing forces size-down before today's open, but the calendar tilts toward defense over the next week-plus. Treat PCE/ISM/NFP dates as approximate (cadence estimates, not verified).

5) SYNTHESIS — META-REGIME + NARROWED BIAS. Meta-regime: corrective bounce inside a weak week, under a rotation-out-of-tech warning, with a geopolitics-heavy (not macro-clean) news tape and FOMC approaching. The signals are MIXED: NQ is oversold and popping (supports a short-term relief long) but the 20-day rotation, thin acceptance above NQ's POC, and no clean lead-lag leader all argue against trusting a tech-led push. When the momentum picture and the regime picture disagree, confidence must come down. I am NEUTRAL with a modest fade-lean on any further NQ rip into 29453/prior-day-high 29192, expecting gravity back toward the 28793–29024 acceptance shelf. Directional bias: NEUTRAL, ~42% conviction. The bullish invalidation of the bearish/neutral thesis: a sustained NQ acceptance back below 28709.75 (prior-day low) would confirm rotation-driven weakness and open the accumulation zone; conversely a decisive hold and build ABOVE 29453 (value-area high) would flip the read toward genuine tech re-leadership and invalidate the fade. Key NQ invalidation level set at 28709.75. 

HUMILITY NOTE: This scorecard is CALIBRATING (n=14; dir-hit 0.786 but regime accuracy only 0.303) — not enough samples to mean anything yet. This is intelligence, not a validated edge. Size small, respect the FOMC window.
